name: sidebar
title: Sidebar
description: Resizable navigation sidebar with drag handle, snap-to-collapse, mobile mode, and nested sections/items.

consumption.typeImport: import type { SidebarProps, SidebarWidth, SidebarSectionProps, SidebarItemProps } from '@compomo/ui';

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Sidebar. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
